class.name: CSVWriter
class.brief_description: Streaming CSV writer with Variant stringification.
class.description: CSVWriter wraps [DSVWriter] and converts Variants with [method CSVExporter.stringify] while writing rows incrementally.

method.name: get_error
method.description: Returns the last error from the underlying [DSVWriter].

method.name: open
method.description: Opens [param file_path] for streaming writes. If [param append] is [code]true[/code], rows are appended to an existing file when possible.

method.name: write_row
method.description: Writes one row. If [member headers] is enabled and [param row] is a [Dictionary], [member header_names] controls the output field order.

members.member: If [code]true[/code], [Color] values are written as HTML color strings.
Header names and dictionary output order used when [member headers] is enabled.
If [code]true[/code], writes one header row before the first data row.
If [code]true[/code], HTML color strings include alpha when [member color_as_hex] is enabled.
